---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, capability, or significant improvement to Lumen
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?
     Describe the user pain without prescribing a solution yet. -->

<!-- Describe the feature. What does it look like? How does it behave?
     Include keyboard shortcuts if relevant. -->

<!-- "As a [persona], I want [capability], so that [outcome]." -->
